findings.blocker: Witness extraction incomplete - proved q ⊔ Ideal.span {n} = ⊤ but did not complete extraction of witnesses a ∈ q, b ∈ S with 1 = a + bn to construct divisibility

attempts.insight: Splits into subset goal (trivial) and divisibility goal (hard)

attempts.lean_error: Type mismatch - intro doesn't work for set equality

attempts.strategy: Fix with ext for set equality
attempts.code_tried: ext ⟨q', hq'⟩; simp only [PrimeSpectrum.mem_zeroLocus, Set.mem_empty_iff_false, iff_false]
attempts.insight: ext is correct approach for proving empty set

attempts.strategy: Show no prime contains q ⊔ Ideal.span {n}
attempts.code_tried: intro hq'mem; -- q' contains q ⊔ Ideal.span {n}, derive contradiction
attempts.insight: Need to extract that q ⊆ q' and n ∈ q'

attempts.strategy: Apply going-down to get q'' ≤ q' lying over p
attempts.code_tried: have hp_le : p ≤ Ideal.comap (algebraMap R S) q' := ...; obtain ⟨q'', hq''_le, hq''_prime, hq''_over⟩ := Ideal.exists_ideal_le_liesOver_of_le q' hp_le
attempts.insight: Going-down gives witness q'' lying over p

attempts.strategy: Use uniqueness to prove q'' = q
attempts.code_tried: have : q'' = q := Subsingleton.elim ⟨q'', hq''_prime, hq''_over⟩ ⟨q, inferInstance, inferInstance⟩
attempts.lean_error: Type mismatch - subtype expects pairs ⟨_, ⟨_, _⟩⟩ not triples

attempts.code_tried: have : (⟨q'', ⟨hq''_prime, hq''_over⟩⟩ : {q : Ideal S // q.IsPrime ∧ q.LiesOver p}) = (⟨q, ⟨inferInstance, inferInstance⟩⟩ : {q : Ideal S // q.IsPrime ∧ q.LiesOver p}) := Subsingleton.elim _ _

attempts.strategy: Derive contradiction from q'' = q and n ∈ q'
attempts.code_tried: have : n ∈ q := by rw [← heq]; exact hq''_le hn_mem; exact hn this

next_steps: Complete witness extraction: use htop to get 1 ∈ q ⊔ Ideal.span {n}, extract a ∈ q and b ∈ S with 1 = a + bn, then construct divisibility proof. Estimated 20-30 lines.
